lines.speaker: Tyras guard
lines.text: Sorry, can't stop to talk. You should go to General Hining if you need something.

lines.speaker: Tyras guard
lines.text: Sorry, I shouldn't give out sensitive information to civilians. You should go to General Hining, in the camp along the road.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know what's south of here?

lines.speaker: Tyras guard
lines.text: No. We sent a scouting party in that direction, when we first established our camp. Some of the men got lost in the swamps. Eventually we listed them as dead.

lines.speaker: Tyras guard
lines.text: Then suddenly they returned, with a wild gleam in their eyes, raving about gods and snakes and all kinds of madness.

lines.speaker: Tyras guard
lines.text: We had to drive them out, in case their condition infected the rest of the troops. Their wives will be given a full widow pension when we return home.

lines.speaker: Tyras guard
lines.text: General Hining concluded that, whatever is down there, it's not affiliated with any of the elf factions, and it should be left alone.
